deviations.description: The modality changed from permission to obligation, introducing a mandatory requirement to terminate the process if it takes more than 30 days. The process model does not contain any activity or event named 'terminate_process', so this obligation is not fulfilled.

The compliance pattern changed from a duration constraint on 'send_SIM_card' to an existence obligation for 'terminate_process' after 30 days. The process model only includes the 'Send SIM card' task and does not include any 'terminate_process' activity, resulting in a violation of the new requirement.

The dimension changed from 'time' (duration of sending SIM card) to 'control_flow' (existence of a termination activity). The process model does not implement any control flow for process termination after 30 days, violating the new control flow requirement.
The required activity changed from 'send_SIM_card' to 'terminate_process'. The process model does not contain any activity named 'terminate_process', so the new requirement is not met.
